svg.text: Updated public overview of the repo's method branches, published metrics, and evaluation boundary
Encodes history into a latent state embedding
Shared input to all public branches
Published in Phase 1. These rows are deployable direct policies.
Main research idea: predict future latent codes before action decoding.
conditioned on Eh and predicted z_future
Upper-bound diagnostic only. Uses future GT code unavailable at real deployment time.
conditioned on Eh and GT z_future
✓ Publishes offline CALVIN metrics for direct policies
✗ Does not publish a predicted-code CALVIN claim
! Closed-loop evaluator in this snapshot is mock-only
Lower offline NLL/MSE is better. GT-code rows remain privileged diagnostics.
Ensure data splits and artifacts are consistent.
Catch planner / adapter path mistakes before silent failure.
BC and MLP rows now use their intended policy heads during training.
Goal: keep the public repo auditable without overstating predicted-code CALVIN evidence.
Updated from a user-provided draft. The original draft image contained stale Phase 1 metrics, so this published SVG refreshes the numbers to the current bugfix-rerun state.
